mapper.select: select period_id, tenant_id, period_type, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time from hc_customer_period_log where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by start_time desc

select period_id, tenant_id, period_type, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time from hc_customer_period_log where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and period_type = #{periodType} and end_time is null order by start_time desc limit 1
mapper.update: update hc_customer_period_log set end_time = #{endTime} where period_id = #{periodId}
mapper.insert: insert into hc_customer_period_log (period_id, tenant_id, period_type, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time) values (#{periodId}, #{tenantId}, #{periodType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
